title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers presents a step-by-step cleanup checklist to avoid surprise charges after deleting AWS resources. The video identifies common hidden costs such as RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms to prevent unexpected bills.
